context: Tests whether Swift Testing migration guidance corrects XCTestCase, fixture, availability, assertion, UI-test boundary, and Xcode 27/SwiftPM interoperability mistakes.

checklist.name: No XCTestCase inheritance
checklist.description: Rejects keeping XCTestCase inheritance for migrated Swift Testing unit tests and uses @Test functions or suites instead.

checklist.name: Isolated fixtures
checklist.description: Recommends per-test fixture setup using suite init, local helpers, actors, or other isolated fixtures instead of shared singleton mutable state.

checklist.name: Availability placement
checklist.description: States that @available belongs on individual @Test functions, not on suite types or containing types.

checklist.name: Assertion migration
checklist.description: Explains that not every XCTest assertion should become #expect and uses #require for required values or unwraps.

checklist.name: Manual issue recording
checklist.description: Maps unconditional manual failures such as XCTFail to Issue.record when that case is discussed.

checklist.name: UI-test boundary
checklist.description: Keeps XCUITest UI automation on XCTest rather than claiming Swift Testing replaces XCTest everywhere.

checklist.name: Coexistence
checklist.description: States that XCTest and Swift Testing can coexist during migration while recommending clear file or target organization when it reduces confusion.

checklist.name: Interop mode guidance
checklist.description: Explains Xcode 27-era interoperability modes, distinguishes pre-Xcode 27 inherited limited mode from new Xcode 27 complete mode, prefers complete or strict mode during migration, and mentions SwiftPM's SWIFT_TESTING_XCTEST_INTEROP_MODE when relevant.

checklist.name: No over-broad cross-framework ban
checklist.description: Avoids claiming cross-framework APIs are categorically forbidden while still recommending native Swift Testing APIs for new Swift Testing tests.
